description: You are an information security engineer performing a formal STRIDE threat model analysis on an OAuth 2.0 authentication service. Using the Data Flow Diagram (DFD) at ~/Diagrams/oauth_threat_model.drawio and the methodology reference at ~/Desktop/stride_reference.txt, enhance the diagram to include labeled trust boundary zones (External, DMZ, Internal), STRIDE threat category annotations for all processes and data stores, and risk-level color coding (Red/High, Orange/Medium, Green/Low). Include a 'Threat Enumeration' table with at least 8 entries covering Threat_ID, Element, STRIDE_Category, Risk_Level, and Proposed_Mitigation. Export the DFD page as SVG to ~/Diagrams/oauth_threat_model.svg and the full diagram as PDF to ~/Diagrams/oauth_threat_model.pdf. Login: username ga, password password123.
